title: vulpia eastwoodiae
intro: Vulpia eastwoodiae, also known as Eastwood's Fescue, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vulpia eastwoodiae include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
